# Sift
> The Fraud Platform that Turns Risk into Revenue
> Sift is the leading fraud prevention platform delivering digital trust to 700+ global brands, allowing them to grow confidently by stopping fraud while enabling excellence in customer experience. Backed by a global data network of over one trillion annual events, Sift helps companies convert risk into revenue and scale without compromise. Brands including Hertz, Yelp, and Poshmark rely on Sift to unlock growth and deliver seamless consumer experiences.

> Generated by Sift on 2026-03-11
